name: web
description: Web development tools including UX design, growth optimization, rapid prototyping, browser automation via agent-browser, Next.js debugging via Chrome DevTools, and design auditing

args: essential_root="$(claude plugin list --json | jq -r '[.[] | select(.id == "essential@alvis" and .enabled)][0].installPath // empty')"; test -n "$essential_root"; exec "$essential_root/bin/alvis-session-start" "$@"

essential_root="$(claude plugin list --json | jq -r '[.[] | select(.id == "essential@alvis" and .enabled)][0].installPath // empty')"; test -n "$essential_root"; exec "$essential_root/bin/alvis-user-prompt-submit" "$@"
